channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Narok Governor Calls for Full Investigation into Helicopter Crash That Killed MP and Five Others
item.description: Narok Governor Patrick Ole Ntutu has urged the national government to conduct a thorough probe into the helicopter crash that killed Emurua Dikirr MP Johana Ngeno and five other people. The tragic inc...

item.title: Trump Signals Hardline Stance on Iran Amid Ongoing Conflict
item.description: President Donald Trump has publicly stated that the United States will not negotiate an end to the conflict with Iran unless Tehran surrenders unconditionally. In a post on Truth Social, Trump insiste...

item.title: Philippine Airlines Cancels Additional Middle East Flights Due to Ongoing Regional Conflict
item.description: Philippine Airlines (PAL) has announced more flight cancellations to and from key Middle East destinations such as Riyadh, Dubai, and Doha as the conflict in the region persists. This comes amid heigh...

item.title: Boko Haram Attack Four Military Bases In Borno, Many Killed And Tanks Burnt
item.description: Late Thursday night till early Friday morning, Boko Haram militants, under the Islamic State West Africa Province (ISWAP), attack four military bases for Konduga, Mainok, Jakana, and Marte town for Bo...

item.title: Anambra State and SNG to Boost Industrialisation with Gas Energy
item.description: Anambra State Government don show say dem ready to join hands with Shell Energy Nigeria (SNG) to use gas as one steady energy source wey go support industrial growth for di state. Prof. Solo Chukwulob...

item.title: Petracca shines in Gold Coast debut after major injuries
item.description: Christian Petracca admitted he had serious doubts about returning to his top form following severe injuries sustained in 2024, which included a lacerated spleen, a punctured lung, and four broken ribs...

item.title: DA refuses to remove billboard featuring AI image of Gauteng Premier amid ANC complaint
item.description: The Democratic Alliance (DA) has declined to remove a controversial billboard depicting Gauteng Premier Panyaza Lesufi under a shower, accompanied by the slogan promoting the DA's promise to improve w...

item.title: Charly Boy honours Obasanjo with unique birthday gift at 89th celebration
item.description: Naija veteran singer and activist, Charly Boy, don make people dey yan for social media after him waka come surprise former President Olusegun Obasanjo with one large gift box for him 89th birthday ce...

item.title: Nitish Kumar Reassures JD(U) Leaders, Approves Son Nishant's Political Entry Amid Rajya Sabha Transition
item.description: In a significant political development, Bihar Chief Minister Nitish Kumar announced his nomination for a Rajya Sabha seat, prompting concern among JD(U) leaders about his decision to step down from th...

item.title: US Justice Department Releases Previously Missing FBI Interview Summaries Containing Unverified Allegations Against Trump from Epstein Files
item.description: The U.S. Department of Justice has released additional FBI documents that were absent from the initial public batch of Jeffrey Epstein files, following reports by media outlets including NBC News. The...

item.title: Critique of President Drumpf’s Militaristic Actions and Peace Claims
item.description: Dis one opinion piece talk about how President Donnie Drumpf, in a big show with all his fans, announce say him go change the Ministry of Defence to Ministry of War. Di author, who be peace scholar, s...

item.title: Man sentenced to life imprisonment for murdering ex-partner's sister and her children in house fire
item.description: A man has been sentenced to a whole-life term after setting fire to a house in Bradford, resulting in the deaths of his ex-partner's sister Bryonie Gawith, 29, and her three children, Denisty, nine, O...

item.title: Kerry Washington discusses her role in Imperfect Women, representation, and embracing natural expressions in acting
item.description: In this interview, Kerry Washington speaks to The Guardian about her latest project, Imperfect Women, an Apple TV+ adaptation of Araminta Hall’s novel. The glossy psychological thriller features Washi...

item.title: INEC Chair Urges Staff to Ensure Free and Credible Elections Before 2027
item.description: The INEC Chairman, Prof. Joash Amupitan, don gather staff for serious talk as dem dey prepare for the 2027 general elections. He tok say make all staff perform their duties with honesty and profession...

item.title: US Temporarily Allows Sale of Russian Oil to India, Congress Questions Government Autonomy
item.description: On 6th March 2026, the Indian National Congress openly criticised Prime Minister Narendra Modi's BJP-led government after the United States temporarily allowed Russian oil, stranded at sea, to be sold...

item.title: Motorcyclist hospitalised after collision with SUV at Belconnen intersection
item.description: A motorcyclist sustained serious injuries in a crash at the intersection of Hennessy Street and Eastern Valley Way in Belconnen on Friday evening, March 6, 2026. Emergency services were called to the ...

item.title: MP Johana Ng'eno dies in Nandi helicopter crash as aide recalls worrying text message
item.description: Emurua Dikirr Member of Parliament Johana Ng'eno has died in a tragic helicopter crash in Mosop, Nandi County, along with five other people. The chopper went down in the evening of Saturday, 28 Februa...

item.title: World Bank Supports Modernisation of Nairobi Commuter Rail with Sh64.6bn Funding
item.description: The World Bank has pledged $500 million, equivalent to about Sh64.6 billion, to support the upgrade of the Nairobi Central-Thika commuter rail. The funding is aimed at transforming the Nairobi Metropo...

item.title: ECP proceeds with delimitation in 24 KP districts despite government’s request for delay
item.description: The Election Commission of Pakistan (ECP) on Friday firmly turned down the request by Khyber Pakhtunkhwa government to postpone the delimitation exercise in 24 districts ahead of the local government ...

item.title: TRA launches forum to educate and support women entrepreneurs on taxes
item.description: DAR ES SALAAM – The Tanzania Revenue Authority (TRA) has officially started the Women and Tax Forum, a special initiative aimed at supporting women in business. Commissioner General Yusuph Mwenda expl...
